response.justification: Despite extensive software experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development in industrial automation or high-performance systems, with most roles centered on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web technologies; there is no evidence of experience with STL, multi-threading, message brokers, IEC 62443, or industrial protocols like MQTT/OPC UA required for the role.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active open-source contributor with architectural depth in event-driven systems
Demonstrated leadership in mentoring and technical workshops
concerns: Minimal to no recent C++ or STL usage in professional context
No exposure to industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443) or OT protocols
Lacks documented experience in multi-threaded, low-latency C++ systems or cloud-native industrial platforms
